name: Oshira-sama
description: The God of Daiken Radish is a large white spirit that wears a red hat. His main appearance in "Sen to Chihiro no Kamikakushi" is when Chihiro and Rin are in the elevator and he/she enters too, leaving little space for Chihiro and causing her a great struggle to pull the elevator lever. He never talks but as he walks, his feet make an adorable "pui" sound which seems a little out of character considering his size.
